interfaces.name: SlotFX
interfaces.signalFlowRole: hot-swappable network slot (selects which compiled network to load)

interfaces.name: TableProcessor
interfaces.signalFlowRole: complex data exposed from compiled network

interfaces.name: SliderPackProcessor
interfaces.signalFlowRole: complex data exposed from compiled network

interfaces.name: AudioSampleProcessor
interfaces.signalFlowRole: complex data exposed from compiled network

parameterGroups.label: Output
parameterGroups.rationale: Standard ModulatorSynth output controls inherited from the base class

parameters.name: Gain
parameters.description: The output volume as normalised linear gain (0.0 to 1.0)

parameters.name: KillFadeTime
parameters.description: The fade out time in milliseconds when voices are killed

standaloneModChains.name: Pitch Modulation
standaloneModChains.note: Modulates the implicit base pitch of all voices

gaps.question: How does the synthesiser load and initialise a compiled C++ network for per-voice processing?
gaps.context: Users need to understand the loading workflow and how voices are managed.

gaps.question: How does the voice rendering pipeline work? How does the compiled network integrate with the standard ModulatorSynth voice architecture (gain modulation, pitch modulation, FX chain)?
gaps.context: The voice rendering order determines how the compiled network output integrates with the HISE module tree.

gaps.question: How are compiled network parameters exposed alongside the fixed Gain/Balance/VoiceLimit/KillFadeTime parameters? What is the parameter offset mechanism?
gaps.context: Users need to understand the dual parameter system.

gaps.question: How do additional modulation chains (beyond Gain and Pitch) map to compiled network parameters? What is NUM_HARDCODED_SYNTH_MODS?
gaps.context: Extra modulation chains are a key feature for parameter automation from the module tree.

gaps.question: How are Tables, SliderPacks, and AudioFiles from the compiled network exposed?
gaps.context: Complex data access is essential for many synthesis algorithms.

gaps.question: How does this differ from ScriptSynth?
gaps.context: Disambiguation between Hardcoded and Script variants.

notes: Inherits standard ModulatorSynth parameters (Gain, Balance, VoiceLimit, KillFadeTime) and modulation chains (Gain, Pitch). Additional network parameters appear after the base parameter offset. Extra modulation chains are added via NUM_HARDCODED_SYNTH_MODS preprocessor.
